name: seep_regen_timing
description: A Seep that grants Regen resolves before the end-of-turn Regen heal: holding Trickle with 5 Regen heals 6 (5 + Trickle's 1), not 5

checks.note: Regen can't overheal, so make room for the heal to be visible
absorb the enemy turn so HP only moves via the heal
Seep's +1 Regen lands before RegenPower heals, so the turn heals 6; healing 5 means Seep ran too late
